statement.headerDoc:
STEP 866 — C8 closure via chat-Claude's LTE one-liner (2026-04-17)

  Acknowledgement: The core LTE identity was suggested by Anthropic Claude
  (web/desktop conversation) reviewing the Collatz briefing memo. Numerically
  verified by Rei (250/250 cases for n ≤ 1000 with v₂(3n+1)=1, 20/20 large
  random, chain bound ratio 0.94 < 1.0 for n ≤ 10⁵).

  This file contains FOUR zero-sorry theorems formalizing the chain step
  and its elementary corollaries:

    1. `v2_chain_step_general` : ∀ odd n, v₂((3n+1)/2 + 1) = v₂(n+1) − 1
       (strictly stronger than chat-Claude's form — no v₂=1 hypothesi

reiTyping.dfumt8Reason: Zero-sorry verified by lake env lean
